agentDetail.monitoring.description: Track the reusable agent activity, cost, and interaction quality across workflows.
agentDetail.monitoring.metrics.activeUse: Unique end users who triggered workflows using this agent.
agentDetail.monitoring.metrics.avgIntera: Average number of agent steps completed per run.
agentDetail.monitoring.metrics.tokenUsag: Estimated token cost produced by this agent across workflow runs.
agentDetail.monitoring.metrics.totalRuns: Total workflow runs that invoked this agent.

roster.description: Reusable agents saved to this workspace. Drag onto any canvas or attach to a workflow node. Edit once — every workflow using this agent picks up the change.
